title: Throughput/effort tracking + per-bank baseline reduction
context: M2's exit criteria include a measurable median per-bank effort reduction versus the M0/M1 recorded baseline. Without consistent effort tracking, this metric cannot be computed. This task defines and implements the effort logging format, collects the M0/M1 data points (pilot-009, bank-014, bank-015), and produces a baseline report from which M2 and M3 improvement will be measured.
objective: Define a per-bank effort logging format, collect effort data from M0/M1 banks, and establish the baseline from which M2 throughput improvement will be measured.
acceptanceCriteria: Effort logging format defined: per-bank fields for authoring time (hours), review time per reviewer type, iteration count, and blockers encountered.
Effort data collected for all completed M0/M1 banks (pilot-009, bank-014, bank-015) retrospectively.
Baseline report committed: median effort per bank and per phase (authoring, review, export, contribution) from M0/M1 data.
Format and baseline committed to the project repo; CC-BY-4.0 licensed; commit DCO signed-off.
output: A committed effort-logging format definition and M0/M1 effort baseline report for measuring M2 throughput improvement.
